title: Fatty liver follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports diabetes, metabolic, alcohol, liver-test, ultrasound, and clinician-reviewed fibrosis context.
assessment.rationale: The exact assessment section supports interval metabolic, alcohol, liver-test, ultrasound, and fibrosis context without diagnosing NAFLD or interpreting fibrosis.

source.title: Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease (NAFLD): assessment and management — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE pathway adaptation
source.population: Adults, young people, and children with suspected or established NAFLD, with age-specific recommendations.
source.setting: Primary and specialist care as qualified by the cited recommendations.
source.exclusions: Supports metabolic and alcohol history, clinician-reviewed ultrasound, liver and fibrosis results, and follow-up context without diagnosing NAFLD or generating tests, referral, or lifestyle advice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports diabetes, metabolic, alcohol, liver-test, ultrasound, and clinician-reviewed fibrosis context.

assessment.text: Supports recording existing monitoring, cirrhosis context, and associated metabolic or cardiovascular conditions.
assessment.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports clinician-entered associated-condition review and follow-up without generating lifestyle, testing, or referral advice.
